rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CHUNG VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 20, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the causes of action 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9, 10 and 12. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 2, 8, 11, and 13. Causes of action in the First Amended Complaint as alleged are not barred by statute of limitations. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that Bank of America kept promising to perform under its contract/promise to fund $75,000 loan up until June 6, 2011 when Plaintiff learned that contrary to May 27, 2011 assurances foreclosure sale went through. Complaint was filed on June 4, 2013. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to negligent misrepresentation, negligence and breach of fiduciary duty causes of action to allege facts re: duty. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to Violation of CC 1940.2 for plaintiff to allege that he is a tenant and/or has standing to sue on behalf of tenants and facts supporting conclusory allegation of threats, force, menace, etc. Demurer is overruled as to causes of action for intentional misrepresentation, fraud and UCL violation. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all elements of these causes of action and justifiable reliance is an issue of fact. Demurer is overruled as to wrongful foreclosure. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged and tender will be inequitable under the circumstances. Demurrer is overruled as to Breach of Contract, Breach of Covenant of Good Faith and Promissory Estoppel. Breached terms of both the mortgage and the $75,000 loan are sufficiently alleged. Allegations regarding destruction of Plaintiffs file must be taken as true. Demurer to Slander of Title is overruled. This cause of action including publication, malice and damages is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM F MCDONAGH JR et al VS. ROMAN SHATSOV et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 20, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANTS ROMAN SHATSOV, ALLA SHATSOVA and AINA BUROVAYA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective. See 24 CFR 982.310. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party and their counsel are ordered again (See CUD-13-644684 March 25, 2013 Minute order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C (courtesy copies).= (501/REQ)
